name: Xero
description: Monitor Xero users and contact records for HR and finance compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Create an app at https://developer.xero.com/app/manage
2. Set redirect URI to: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
3. Copy Client ID and Secret
4. After connecting, enter your Xero Tenant/Organization ID (found in Xero settings URL)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Xero users with system access

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Xero contacts are maintained with complete information
